character.name: A tiny humanoid fae creature for a cozy pixel art game, roughly the size of a hand and always slightly airborne, floating rather than standing on the ground. Delicate, gentle facial features with small pointed ears, no antennae, no insect-like body parts. Four small iridescent dragonfly wings — geometric, delicate, and translucent, with symmetrical patterns that catch faint rainbow highlights.  Small expressive face with a calm, content, curious expression. Soft rounded pixel art style matching a warm storybook aesthetic, crisp clean pixel edges, no anti-aliasing, no dithering, transparent background.
